discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹47,566,836, but 5-year family income is only ₹10,412,285. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹37,154,551.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Commercial Buildings purchased in 2004 for ₹3,825,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹12,727,434) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹51,000,000.

discrepancies.title: Mathematical Mismatch (Assets)
discrepancies.description: Sum of individual assets (₹134,904,977) does not match declared total assets (₹336,789,255). Difference: ₹201,884,278
